subcodes.title: Words to Wilson, Engelhorn, Stewart, Brittingham, spoken around 1909-10-23
subcodes.first_line: The Jews for a thousand and five hundred years were awaiting the coming, and their utmost desire was to live in the day of the Messiah
subcodes.subjects: @suffering; rejection of Christ, @corruption; misinterpretation of the Word of God, @blind imitation [taqlid], @birth of Christ; purity; virginity of Mary, @worldliness vs. other-worldliness
